name: kbd-demo
visual_summary: The kbd-demo component is a simple keyboard demonstration component that displays a keyboard layout and keys in a minimalistic design. This component can be used when creating tutorials or guides about keyboard shortcuts or typing techniques. It is suitable for use in educational or instructional content.
